nasb.text: In the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, this word came to Jeremiah from the Lord, saying,

esv.text: In the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah, this word came to Jeremiah from the Lord:

cnv.text: 猶大王約西亞的兒子約雅敬第四年，耶和華那裡有這話臨到耶利米，說：

ccb.text: 犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬执政第四年，耶和华对耶利米说：
